intro: Applying as a **Web Developer** in India means competing with hundreds of similar profiles on Naukri and LinkedIn. Recruiters shortlist on keywords, project depth, and clarity — not just degree name.
This **web developer resume checker** page lets you upload your CV and get AI feedback tuned to Web Developer expectations: skills match, bullet impact, and red flags before HR sees your application.

sections.title: ATS keywords recruiters expect for Web Developer
paragraphs: Applicant Tracking Systems at Indian IT firms, product companies, and agencies scan for role-specific terms. For **Web Developer** profiles, ensure these appear naturally in projects and experience — not stuffed in a keyword block:
bullets: Web Developer fundamentals
Communication
Problem solving
MS Excel / Google Sheets
Documentation
Team collaboration

sections.title: How to structure a Web Developer fresher CV
paragraphs: Lead with a crisp summary naming **Web Developer** and your strongest stack. Projects beat coursework — each bullet should say what you built, tools used, and outcome. Internships count as experience when described with ownership.
Keep one page for 0–2 years experience. Use the checker below, fix the top 3 roast items, then tailor keywords from each job description before applying.
bullets: Summary: role + stack + one metric or project highlight
Projects: 2–3 with GitHub or demo links where possible
Skills: split into Core / Tools / Soft — avoid filler
Education: CGPA if above company cutoff; else projects lead

sections.title: Common Web Developer resume mistakes in India
paragraphs: These fail most **web developer resume checker** reviews we see from Indian candidates:
bullets: Listing Web Developer as a skill without project or internship proof
One generic CV sent to all companies — no role keywords in bullets
Missing quantified outcomes (%, time saved, users impacted)
Skills section copied from Naukri template without tools you actually used
Two-page fresher CV with school achievements from 2015 still listed
No link to GitHub, portfolio, or case study for technical roles

sections.title: Improve your score in one session
paragraphs: Upload below for a free **web developer resume checker** run. Score under 7? Rewrite project bullets with action verbs and numbers. Re-check until clarity improves.

faq.question: Is this web developer resume checker free?
faq.answer: Yes — 2 free checks per device on MyCVRoast. No email required for your first roasts.

faq.question: What should a Web Developer fresher highlight?
faq.answer: Projects, internships, and tools from the Web Developer stack (Web Developer fundamentals, Communication, Problem solving). Avoid empty "team player" skills without evidence.

faq.question: Can I use the same CV for every company?
faq.answer: Base CV yes — but tailor keywords from each JD. Use JD Match on the dashboard for a 0–100 ATS match score.

faq.question: How long should a fresher resume be?
faq.answer: One page for campus and 0–2 years experience. The checker flags fluff that pushes CV to two pages without adding value.
